title: Senior Doctor - Laurus Labs Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Laurus Labs Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Laurus Labs Capital India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Laurus Labs Capital India:
Laurus Labs Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs Capital India!
